backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the AI Travel Itinerary Generator backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Itinerary, TravelGuide, etc.) and CRUD operations for user profiles, itineraries, reviews, travel guides, and email captures with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming two Google AdSense integration features: adding the Auto Ads script tag to index.html and creating an AdBanner.tsx component placed on the HomePage.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON mapping of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each component or page's purpose within the travel itinerary app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, including Google Fonts (Playfair Display), a placeholder Google AdSense Auto Ads script tag with instructions to replace the publisher ID, and the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, planner, itinerary, shared, guides, admin) and wraps the app in ThemeProvider, ProfileSetupModal, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/ActivityCard.tsx: Card component displaying a single travel activity's name, type badge, description, and location, with embedded ReviewsList and AddReviewForm components.
frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx: Google AdSense display ad component that renders an <ins class='adsbygoogle'> element with placeholder publisher ID and slot ID, pushing to the adsbygoogle queue on mount.
frontend/src/components/AddReviewForm.ts: Collapsible form for authenticated users to submit a star rating and comment review for a given item, using the useAddReview mutation hook and displaying toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AddTravelGuideFo: A form component for creating new travel guides with title, description, and optional season fields, using the useAddTravelGuide mutation hook and displaying toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/BookingLinks.tsx: Displays a card with external booking buttons for flights, hotels, and activities, generating affiliate URLs via a utility function based on destination and travel dates.
frontend/src/components/DayTimeline.tsx: Renders a single itinerary day divided into morning, afternoon, and evening time blocks, displaying each activity using ActivityCard components with corresponding icons.
frontend/src/components/EmailCaptureModa: A dialog modal that collects a user's email and optional dream destination to send a free mini-itinerary, requiring marketing consent before submitting via the useCaptureEmail mutation.
A button that exports an itinerary as a PDF for premium users, showing an upgrade prompt modal for non-premium users and handling download via a blob URL.
frontend/src/components/ItineraryDisplay: Displays a full itinerary with a header card showing destination and metadata, booking links, and tabbed views for timeline (per-day DayTimeline cards) and map (ItineraryMap) layouts.
frontend/src/components/ItineraryMap.tsx: A placeholder map component that lists activity locations from all itinerary days and displays a 'coming soon' message in place of an actual interactive map.
frontend/src/components/ItineraryRequest: A form for submitting a new itinerary request with destination, travel dates, interest checkboxes, and budget tier selection, navigating to the new itinerary page on successful submission.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a sticky navigation header, a router outlet for page content, and a footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a login/logout button using Internet Identity authentication, showing the user's name when logged in and handling login state transitions.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar with links to the planner and guides pages, active-state highlighting, and the LoginButton component.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to create a profile on first login.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsList.tsx: Displays a list of community reviews for a given item, fetching reviewer profiles to show names, ratings, and comments.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: Button that generates a shareable link for an itinerary and provides copy-to-clipboard and Twitter/Facebook sharing options via a dialog.
frontend/src/components/TravelGuidesGrid: Renders a responsive grid of travel guide cards fetched from the backend, with optional limit and navigation to individual guide detail pages.
frontend/src/components/UpgradePromptMod: Modal dialog advertising premium subscription features with a list of benefits and an upgrade button (subscription management noted as coming soon).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including user profiles, itineraries, reviews, and travel guides, with appropriate cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind, defines a tropical/sunset OKLCH color palette with light/dark CSS variables, and provides custom utility classes for gradients and themed colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminGuidesPage.tsx: Admin-only page for managing travel guides that checks the caller's role and renders an access-denied card for non-admins, or shows the guide creation form and existing guides grid for admins.
frontend/src/pages/GuideDetailPage.tsx: Detail page for a single travel guide that displays its description, season badge, and a list of example itineraries with navigation to individual itinerary pages.
frontend/src/pages/GuidesPage.tsx: Simple page that renders a header and the TravelGuidesGrid component to browse all curated travel guides.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Marketing landing page featuring a hero section with CTA buttons, feature highlights, travel guides grid, ad banner, and an email capture modal.
frontend/src/pages/ItineraryPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays a single itinerary by ID, handling loading, error, and not-found states, and passing ownership status to ItineraryDisplay.
frontend/src/pages/PlannerPage.tsx: Trip planning page that gates access behind Internet Identity authentication and renders the ItineraryRequestForm for logged-in users.
frontend/src/pages/SharedItineraryPage.t: Renders a read-only view of a shared itinerary by extracting the itinerary ID from a share URL parameter and fetching it via a query hook, with loading and error states.
Generates affiliate booking URLs for flights (Expedia), hotels (Booking.com), and activities (Viator) based on destination and date parameters.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with a tropical color palette using OKLCH variables, custom shadows, accordion animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3 for the AI Travel Planner, recording existing AdSense integration features and a pending new feature request to integrate Google AdSense on the website.
